Circular logging systems, flash storage management, advanced logging, app logging, Bluetooth log dumping, reboot reason analysis, flash logging management, power tracking, and MCU debugging functions.

## Folders
- **[default](default/README.md)**: Implements a circular logging system for flash memory, managing log generations and log storage.
- **[legacy](legacy/README.md)**: Manages flash storage and logging for debug data with boot generation organization and SPI flash logging.

## Files
- **[advanced_logging.c](advanced_logging.c.md)**: Advanced logging system for buffering and writing log messages to flash memory with mutex protection.
- **[advanced_logging.h](advanced_logging.h.md)**: Functions for initializing advanced logging and logging messages with optional asynchronous mode.
- **[app_logging.c](app_logging.c.md)**: Implements app logging functionality with serial and Bluetooth support for Pebble firmware.
- **[debug.c](debug.c.md)**: Implements Bluetooth log dumping and debug initialization for Pebble firmware.
- **[debug.h](debug.h.md)**: Debug logging macros and functions for initialization and printing the last launched app.
- **[debug_reboot_reason.c](debug_reboot_reason.c.md)**: Logs and analyzes reboot reasons for Pebble devices, including handling various reboot scenarios.
- **[debug_reboot_reason.h](debug_reboot_reason.h.md)**: Declares a function to print the MCU reboot reason for debugging purposes.
- **[flash_logging.h](flash_logging.h.md)**: Functions and definitions for managing flash logging, including initialization, writing, and dumping logs.
- **[power_tracking.c](power_tracking.c.md)**: Implements power tracking for various systems with start, stop, and flush functionalities.
- **[power_tracking.h](power_tracking.h.md)**: Header file for power profiling on Pebble Smartwatch, defining power systems and tracking functions.
- **[setup.c](setup.c.md)**: Functions to enable or disable MCU debugging and handle low power debug commands.
- **[setup.h](setup.h.md)**: Functions to enable and disable MCU debugging.
